title: Colorful Leaves
description: Simply make leaves more Colorful and Vibrant!
body:
# 🍃 Colorful Leaves – Simple & Vibrant!

**Colorful Leaves is a lightweight resource pack that makes all leaves more vibrant and colorful while keeping the vanilla look.** It’s a small
but effective tweak that makes forests and trees look better without changing anything else!
** **
### ✨ Features
- 🌿 **Brighter, more colorful leaves** – nothing else changed!
  
- ⚡ **Super lightweight** – no performance impact.
  
- ✅ **Works with any other resource pack** – stack it with anything!
  
- 🎨 **No shaders or mods required** – just drop it in and enjoy!


** **
**You are not allowed to Sell or rehost this ressource pack elsewhere. All downloads should go through our Official Modrinth pages.**
